overview: Sultai Depths is a Legacy black-green ramp archetype that accelerates mana to cast large spells ahead of schedule. By leveraging Lotus Petal and Crop Rotation, it rapidly builds a mana base while cycling toward win conditions. Elvish Spirit Guide provides early board presence and card advantage, stabilizing against aggressive strategies.
win_conditions: Casting oversized threats on turn two or three
Generating massive card advantage through land cycling
Overwhelming the opponent with early token pressure

keep_criteria: Hands with multiple lands and early accelerators
Combinations including Crop Rotation and a non-basic land
At least two sources of mana by turn two
mulligan_criteria: Three or more cards of the same land type without fetch synergy
Hands missing Elvish Spirit Guide or Lotus Petal

early_game: Play lands and accelerators to establish mana base
Use Crop Rotation to find optimal lands while cycling
Deploy Elvish Spirit Guide for early board presence and card draw
mid_game: Convert accumulated mana into mid-sized threats
Maintain board control with token generation
Cycle through deck to find win conditions
late_game: Cast oversized finishers ahead of schedule
Leverage mana advantage to out-resource opponents
Apply consistent pressure with recurring threats

key_cards.name: Lotus Petal
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to enable turn two spells; discard or sacrifice as needed for card advantage

key_cards.name: Crop Rotation
key_cards.notes: Use to find specific non-basic lands while maintaining hand size; pair with fetch lands for consistency

key_cards.name: Elvish Spirit Guide
key_cards.role: Early board presence and card engine
key_cards.notes: Deploy on turn one to generate tokens and draw cards; use tokens to untap lands or block early threats

sequencing_tips: Prioritize playing Lotus Petal before Crop Rotation to maximize turn two mana
Cycle Crop Rotation only when you have sufficient mana sources in play
Hold Elvish Spirit Guide in hand if you need to untap lands for a big play

matchups.advice: Focus on early token generation and land untapping to stabilize
Race with mid-sized threats before they establish counters
Disrupt their mana base and race with early pressure

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Lotus Petal, Crop Rotation, Elvish Spirit Guide

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Lotus Petal, Crop Rotation, Elvish Spirit Guide

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Lotus Petal, Crop Rotation, Elvish Spirit Guide

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Lotus Petal, Crop Rotation, Elvish Spirit Guide
